resolvedQuestions.question: What is the live md-generator contract and path?
resolvedQuestions.answer: The active packet is .opencode/skills/sk-design/design-md-generator. It extracts live CSS into tokens.json, builds a v3 Style Reference through deterministic value-section emitters, then validates fidelity.

resolvedQuestions.question: Which prior recommendations are already implemented?
resolvedQuestions.answer: authoring_boundary.md and source_of_truth_router_card.md are present, and v3 doc-as-view emitters plus validation scoring exist.

resolvedQuestions.question: What most improves efficiency?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Restore setup viability around the missing backend package.json, then add a guided preflight/run wrapper over extract -> build-write-prompt -> validate -> report.

resolvedQuestions.question: What most improves routing?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Expand mode aliases and benchmark cases beyond extraction to validation, report/preview/proof, style-reference study, DESIGN.md update, and live-URL refusal/boundary intents.

resolvedQuestions.question: What should not be added?
resolvedQuestions.answer: Do not add forward authoring, a second backend, duplicated format/taxonomy references, bulk corpus imports, or hub-level per-mode logic.

keyFindings.title: Restore backend setup viability before other tooling UX work
keyFindings.rationale: The documented one-time setup requires backend/package.json, but the nested backend has package-lock.json and no package.json in this checkout. That makes npm install, npm test, and the advertised bin fragile or impossible.

keyFindings.title: Expand routing aliases and benchmark cases for non-extract md-generator intents
keyFindings.rationale: Live routing aliases cover extraction/generation, but the mode also owns validation-only, visual reports, and example study. The operator-supplied Mode A score of 76/100 plausibly reflects this narrower routing surface.

keyFindings.title: Add a guided pipeline wrapper/preflight to reduce operator friction
keyFindings.rationale: The current CLI is extraction-oriented and hands the user several next commands. A wrapper that preflights Node/Chromium/package readiness, runs extraction, builds the prompt, validates, and optionally reports would improve efficiency without changing fidelity rules.

keyFindings.title: Align manual playbook probes with emitted schema and add a short smoke lane
keyFindings.rationale: The full 13-scenario playbook is valuable for release readiness, but day-to-day use needs a smaller smoke path. Prior review also flagged stale schema expectations around detector and interaction fields, so probes should verify meta.framework, iconSystem, motionSystem, a11yTokens, and component variant state fields.

keyFindings.title: Add one non-SaaS exemplar only after setup/routing work
keyFindings.rationale: The existing examples are strong but clustered around developer/SaaS surfaces. A real editorial, ecommerce, hospitality, or maximalist extraction would broaden study coverage without adding abstract references.

ruledOutDirections: Bulk import of the 43-entry external corpus
Duplicate format/taxonomy docs when existing references already cover them
Per-mode logic in the sk-design hub
Completion claims based on docs without running validator/tooling
